jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Medanta
jsonLd.description:
Medanta has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Medanta:
Medanta is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta!
